steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Add the two equations: $\left(5\right)(9x) + (-5)(9x) + 4(8y) + 4(8y) = 16 + 16$, giving $\left(8\right)(8y) = 32$, so $8y = 4$. Subtract: $\left(10\right)(9x) = 0$, so $9x = 0$.

steps.title: Find the value $9x + 8y$
steps.content: $9x + 8y = 0 + 4 = 4$. That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
